name: luxereserve
description: Global Luxury Hotel Reservation Engine — Polyglot Persistence (SQL Server + MongoDB)

scripts.db:init: sqlcmd -S localhost\SQLEXPRESS -i database/sql/01_create_database.sql -C && sqlcmd -S localhost\SQLEXPRESS -d LuxeReserve -i database/sql/02_create_tables.sql -C
scripts.db:seed: sqlcmd -S localhost\SQLEXPRESS -d LuxeReserve -i database/sql/06_seed_data.sql -C && node database/mongodb/02_seed_data.js
scripts.db:all: npm run db:init && npm run db:views && npm run db:triggers && npm run db:procedures && npm run db:seed
